description_en: Biophysical foundations of neuronal activity and neural coding, with mathematical models, Bayesian decoding and information theory.
competencies: Describe biophysical generation of neuronal activity mathematically
Model neurons with RC, LIF and Hodgkin-Huxley equations
Analyse encoding and decoding of sensory information
Apply Bayesian estimation and information-theoretic measures
Simulate dynamical neural systems in self-written programs

description_en: Teaches the fundamentals of psychoacoustics, including loudness calculation, sound measurement and perceptual characterization of technical and environmental noise.
competencies: Describe fundamental psychoacoustic quantities and their physical correlates
Apply measurement methods for hearing acoustics
Calculate loudness as a basic perceptual quantity
Characterize perception of noise, tonal sounds and binaural hearing

description_en: Fundamentals, design, operation and control of fluid-energy machines such as pumps, turbines and compressors for efficient energy conversion.
competencies: Explain working principles and construction of turbomachines
Select and dimension pumps, turbines and compressors
Analyse operating behaviour and control for optimal energy conversion
Apply affinity laws and dimensionless characteristic numbers
Assess energy transfer in fluid-flow machines

description_en: Course on formulating, analyzing and numerically solving population-balance models for disperse systems in particle and bioprocess engineering.
competencies: Recognize population-dynamic mechanisms in disperse systems
Formulate and analyze population-balance models mathematically
Solve population balances with specialized numerical methods
Apply population-balance results to process design and operation

description_en: Course teaching molecular modeling and simulation as an engineering tool using Monte-Carlo, molecular-dynamics and quantum-mechanical methods.
competencies: Apply molecular modeling tools across spatial and temporal scales
Use Monte-Carlo methods for equilibrium and dynamic simulations
Run molecular-dynamics simulations of diffusion and nucleation
Match process-engineering problems to adequate models and numerical methods

description_en: Course on conceptual process design via steady-state and dynamic simulation of chemical processes using Aspen Plus and Aspen Dynamics.
competencies: Perform steady-state and dynamic process simulation in Aspen Plus/Dynamics
Model unit operations such as reactors, columns and heat exchangers
Configure recycle streams and overall process flowsheets
Evaluate alternative process variants for conceptual process design

title_de: Simulation und Steuerung/Regelung der biol. Abwasserreinigung
description_en: Dynamic simulation and control of biological wastewater treatment using activated sludge models for reliable, economic plant operation.
competencies: Build dynamic simulation models of wastewater treatment plants
Apply activated sludge models (ASM3) to biological treatment
Calibrate and verify plant models with simulation software
Design measurement and oxygen control concepts for treatment plants
Combine steady-state design with dynamic simulation

description_en: Advanced fluid mechanics course on complex flows including compressible, turbulent, multiphase and non-Newtonian flow phenomena.
competencies: Analyze and compute complex flows in process engineering apparatus
Treat compressible flows with friction, heat transfer and shock waves
Model laminar and turbulent boundary layers and turbulence
Analyze multiphase and non-Newtonian fluid flows
